displayDescription.zh: 2015年，微软亚洲研究院的何恺明、张祥雨、任少卿和孙剑提出残差学习。ResNet 通过快捷连接让很深的网络学习增量修正，而不是完整变换，解决了深层网络训练中的实际瓶颈，并成为视觉系统的常用骨干网络。融合后的版本结合了深度学习发展线对工程简洁性和可训练性的强调，以及 AI100 的论文来源和残差块解释。
displayDescription.en: In 2015, Kaiming He, Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, and Jian Sun introduced residual learning at Microsoft Research Asia. ResNet used shortcut connections so very deep networks could learn residual refinements instead of full transformations, solving a practical training bottleneck and becoming a standard visual backbone. The fused version combines the deep-learning storyline's emphasis on engineering simplicity and trainability with the AI100 paper sources and residual-block explanation.

title.en: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
title.zh: 用于图像识别的深度残差学习

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.zh: ResNet 引入残差连接，使很深的网络可以学习增量修正，而不是完整变换。它让数百层网络变得可训练，并成为视觉系统的常用骨干网络。
html.en: ResNet introduced residual connections that let very deep networks learn refinements instead of full transformations. It made hundreds of layers trainable and became a backbone for vision systems.

html.zh: 捷径路径把输入加回学习得到的残差变换。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。
html.en: A shortcut path adds the input back to a learned residual transformation. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 ResNet 视为超深网络设计的转折点。它的长期影响在于残差学习：捷径连接让深度更容易优化，并成为视觉及其他领域的标准骨干思想。
html.en: Experts generally treat ResNet as a turning point in very deep network design. Its long-term legacy is residual learning: the shortcut-connection pattern that made depth easier to optimize and became a standard backbone idea across vision and beyond.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.

category.en: Deep Learning and the Unification of Paradigms (2010s-2020s)
category.zh: 深度学习与范式归一（2010年代至2020年代）

role.zh: ResNet 共同作者与通讯作者

quote.en: "ResNet reformulated layers as residual functions and used identity shortcuts, making it possible to optimize much deeper visual recognition networks."
quote.zh: "ResNet 把网络层重新表述为残差函数，并使用恒等捷径连接，使更深的视觉识别网络能够被有效优化。"

workTitle.en: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
workTitle.zh: 用于图像识别的深度残差学习

workAuthors.zh: 何恺明、张祥雨、任少卿、孙剑，CVPR，2016

quotePage.zh: CVPR 2016 论文《用于图像识别的深度残差学习》

quoteAttribution.zh: 《用于图像识别的深度残差学习》, 何恺明、张祥雨、任少卿、孙剑，CVPR，2016

method.zh: 带捷径连接的残差学习

demo.en: A shortcut path adds the input back to a learned residual transformation.
demo.zh: 捷径路径把输入加回学习得到的残差变换。

text.en: The input can flow around a block and be added back.
text.zh: 输入可以绕过模块并被加回输出。

text.en: The network learns changes to features rather than replacing them entirely.
text.zh: 网络学习特征变化，而不是完全替换特征。

text.en: A shortcut path adds the input back to a learned residual transformation.
text.zh: 捷径路径把输入加回学习得到的残差变换。
